eea.t: abbr. 欧洲经济区（The European Economic Area）；电器与电子文摘（英国期刊Electrical and Electronics Abstracts）；乙烯-醋酸丙烯共聚物

eec.d: n an international organization of European countries formed after World War II to reduce trade barriers and increase cooperation among its members

eecs.t: abbr. Electrical Engineering and Computer Service 电力工程和计算机服务

eed.t: abbr. ectoderm development 外胚层发育; elastic energy density 弹能强度; electrical explosive device 电子爆炸装置

eef.t: abbr. eukaryotic elongation factor 真核延伸因子

eeg.t:

eeigs.t: (eeig 的复数) abbr. European Economic Interest Grouping 欧洲经济利益组

eel.d:
n. the fatty flesh of eel; an elongate fish found in fresh water in Europe and America; large eels are usually smoked or pickled
n. voracious snakelike marine or freshwater fishes with smooth slimy usually scaleless skin and having a continuous vertical fin but no ventral fins

eel-pouts.t: (eel-pout 的复数) n. 粘鱼类；绵科鱼

eelfare.t: n. 幼鳗群之逆河而上, 一群幼鳗

eelgrass.d: n. submerged marine plant with very long narrow leaves found in abundance along North Atlantic coasts

eellike.t: a. 似鳗的, 行动似鳗的
eellike.d: s resembling an eel in being long and thin and sinuous

eelpot.t: n. 捕鳗用的细颈篮或其他工具
eelpot.d:
n. A boxlike structure with funnel-shaped traps for catching
   eels; an eelbuck.

eelpout.d:
n marine eellike mostly bottom-dwelling fishes of northern seas
n elongate freshwater cod of northern Europe and Asia and North America having barbels around its mouth

eels.t: abbr. 电子能量损失谱学（Electron Energy Loss Spectroscopy）；电子发射器定位系统（Electronic Emitter Location System）
eels.d:
n the fatty flesh of eel; an elongate fish found in fresh water in Europe and America; large eels are usually smoked or pickled
n voracious snakelike marine or freshwater fishes with smooth slimy usually scaleless skin and having a continuous vertical fin but no ventral fins

eelspear.d: n. A spear with barbed forks for spearing eels.

eelworm.d: n. any of various small free-living plant-parasitic roundworms
